hooks.command: python3 -c "import json, shutil, subprocess, sys; payload=json.load(sys.stdin); tool_input=payload.get('tool_input') or {}; path=tool_input.get('file_path') or tool_input.get('path') or ''; sys.exit(0) if not path.endswith('.py') or shutil.which('ruff') is None else sys.exit(subprocess.call(['ruff', 'check', path]))"
